prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年安徽省该科类最低录取位次分别为约943名→827名→877名→1057名→1558名，整体呈后移趋势。2021–2023年（理科）位次在827–943区间波动，2024年 改为物理类后位次后移至1057名，2025年进一步大幅后移至1558名，近两年累计后移约701名，竞争明显加剧。2025年基准位次约1558名；该校在安徽省招生计 划：2021–2024年均为12人，2025年增至13人，2026年进一步扩至17人（物理类），较2025年增加4人，扩招幅度约30.8%。扩招意味着投放名额增加，理论上 使竞争略有缓解，但扩招幅度较大，位次数字预计后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学医学院隶属于浙江大学（985/211/双一流），软科中国大学排名2026年浙江大学主榜第3名（T op3），属全国顶尖高校层次，对考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内浙江大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端、师德师风及校园安全事件（如学术造假 、女厕偷窥等），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制。抖音热度方面，浙江大学总排名第14位（高热），短视频曝光量大，整体关注度仍处高位。历史投档异常记录显示2021 –2023年浙江大学在部分省份有中低关注度的投档线波动，但未出现明显断档；浙江大学临床医学为A级学科，基础医学A-，药学A+，生物学A，口腔医学等医学 相关学科实力雄厚。该校招生专业（临床医学5+3一体化、临床医学5年制、医学试验班等）均对应A级学科，学科优势突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床 医学专业2024年热度指数70.19（推荐），口腔医学72.31（推荐），医学类专业整体持续偏热，报考热度不减。安徽省2026年普通高考总人数约451000人，物理类考生按近年占比 （约69.6%）估算约313896人，较2025年物理类320779人略有减少（约-2.1%），竞争压力小幅缓解。；浙江大学医学院位于 浙江省杭州市，属长三角核心城市，地域吸引力强。安徽省与浙江省相邻，跨省报考热度较高，地域偏好对位次有支撑作用。该校在安徽省招生计划占比较小（约17人），属跨省 招生，无本省倾斜效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1558名、2026年大幅扩招30.8%（位次后移约288名）、考生总数略有减少（竞争略缓解）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制 ）及医学专业持续高热（支撑位次），经，预测2026年最低录取位次约1816名，较2025年后移约258名。位次区间1609–2023名，波动幅度反映历史波动 与学校层次特征。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）（校本部）
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班）（含临床医学；校本部）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（校本部）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无（该校2026年在安徽省仅投放上述三个招生专业，均已归入一档和二档）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1816名，位次区间1609–2023名。位次在区间下限（1609名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档专业（临床医学5+3一体化、巴德年医学班）；位次在区间中段（约1800名附 近）的考生以二档临床医学（5年制）为主、一档为辅；位次在区间上限（2023名）附近的考生可冲二档并关注其他院校的医学类专业保底。鉴于该校医学学科实力顶尖（临床医 学A），建议高分考生优先考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this category in Anhui Province were approximately 943 → 827 → 877 → 1057 → 1558, showing an overall backward trend. From 2021 to 2023 (Science category), rankings fluctuated between 827 and 943. In 2024, after switching to the Physics category, the ranking moved back to 1057, and in 2025 it further significantly moved back to 1558, with a cumulative backward shift of about 701 positions over the past two years, indicating intensified competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1558. The university's enrollment plan in Anhui Province: 12 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 13 in 2025, and further expanded to 17 in 2026 (Physics category), an increase of 4 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 30.8%. Expansion means more slots are available, theoretically easing competition slightly, but the large expansion rate suggests the ranking number will likely move back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University School of Medicine is affiliated with Zhejiang University (985/211/ Double First-Class). In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, Zhejiang University ranks 3rd (Top 3) on the main list, placing it among the top national universities, which strongly attracts candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents (such as academic fraud, peeping in women's restrooms, etc.), which may slightly suppress some candidates' application intentions. On Douyin (TikTok), Zhejiang University ranks 14th overall (high heat), with large short video exposure, maintaining high overall attention. Historical admission anomaly records show that from 2021 to 2023, Zhejiang University experienced low-to-medium attention fluctuations in admission cutoffs in some provinces, but no significant gaps. Zhejiang University's Clinical Medicine is an A-level discipline, Basic Medicine A-, Pharmacy A+, Biology A, and Stomatology and other medical-related disciplines are strong. The university's enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine 5+3 Integrated Program, Clinical Medicine 5-Year Program, Medical Experimental Class, etc.) all correspond to A-level disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary advantages, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Clinical Medicine was 70.19 (recommended), and for Stomatology was 72.31 (recommended). Medical majors overall continue to be hot, with unabated application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Anhui Province is about 451,000, with Physics category candidates estimated at about 313,896 based on the recent proportion (about 69.6%), a slight decrease from the 2025 Physics category count of 320,779 (about -2.1%), slightly easing competition pressure. Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal. Anhui Province is adjacent to Zhejiang Province, so cross-province application enthusiasm is high, and regional preference supports the ranking. The university's enrollment plan in Anhui Province is relatively small (about 17 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1558, the significant 30.8% enrollment expansion in 2026 (ranking backward shift of about 288 positions), a slight decrease in total candidates (slightly eased competition), a somewhat negative reputation (slight suppression), and sustained high popularity of medical majors (supporting the ranking), the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 1816, a backward shift of about 258 positions from 2025. The ranking range is 1609–2023, with fluctuation reflecting historical volatility and university level characteristics.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) (Main Campus)
- Medical Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Ba De Nian Medical Class) (Including Clinical Medicine; Main Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- None (The university only offers the above three enrollment majors in Anhui Province in 2026, all already classified into Tier 1 and Tier 2).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1816, ranking range 1609–2023. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (1609) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine 5+3 Integrated Program, Ba De Nian Medical Class); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 1800) should primarily target Tier 2 Clinical Medicine (5-Year Program) with Tier 1 as a supplement; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (2023) can try for Tier 2 and consider other medical majors from other universities as a safety option. Given the university's top-tier medical disciplines (Clinical Medicine A), high-scoring candidates are advised to prioritize it.
